compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement CoVe verification in detect-stack.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add content verification to detect-stack.sh for each detection path. When verification fails, fall through to the next detection instead of returning the unverified result.

### Content verification per stack type:
- python-poetry: Verify pyproject.toml is non-empty AND contains [tool.poetry] or [build-system] or [project] section
- node-npm: Verify package.json is valid JSON (parseable by python3 json.load)
- rust-cargo: Verify Cargo.toml is non-empty
- golang: Verify go.mod is non-empty
- convention-based: Already verifies target presence (no change needed)

### Backward compatibility note
This is a behavioral change: consumers that relied on file-existence-only detection may now receive 'unknown' for empty/corrupt marker files. project-detect.sh (the primary consumer) already handles 'unknown' as a fallback. Verify all callers handle this gracefully.

### Implementation approach
Add content checks after each file-existence check. Use test -s for non-empty checks. Use grep for section presence checks. Use python3 for JSON validation.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh (modify — add content verification)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh exits 0 with all CoVe tests passing
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh
- [ ] Empty pyproject.toml no longer triggers python-poetry
  Verify: d=$(mktemp -d) && touch "$d/pyproject.toml" && result=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh "$d") && rm -rf "$d" && test "$result" != 'python-poetry'
- [ ] Valid pyproject.toml still triggers python-poetry (regression guard)
  Verify: d=$(mktemp -d) && echo '[build-system]' > "$d/pyproject.toml" && result=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/detect-stack.sh "$d") && rm -rf "$d" && test "$result" = 'python-poetry'
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker after tests pass GREEN
  Verify: ! grep -q 'detect-stack.sh.*\[test_detect_stack' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — RED tests exist from 090a-1af8) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Implemented CoVe content verification in detect-stack.sh — empty/corrupt marker files now fall through
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
